reasoning: Koren, to effectively target your lactate clearance limitation, you'll focus on over-unders to simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop climb. Your last ride showed a need for a structured approach to improving your aerobic base and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 2 min at 242-256W with 4 min at 201-218W. Repeat 5 times.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
